title: RPC case histories - monitoring and evaluation plans, May 2025
body: "This section of case histories updates previous RPC case history guidance on addressing monitoring and evaluation plans in impact assessments. The document provides practical guidance with new ‘case history’ examples, in areas such as insulation, online safety and merchant shipping. The document includes a sections explaining how M&E should link to the Magenta Book and the RPC’s expectations.  The RPC welcomes any feedback on our guidance. Please contact us via enquiries@rpc.gov.uk with feedback or if you have any questions. "
